message:
test(unit): add unit tests for formatting, test utils, and content validation

Adds comprehensive unit test coverage for utilities and content integrity,
establishing a foundation for catching regressions and data quality issues.

## tests/unit/format-stars.test.ts (42 tests)

### formatStarCount Tests
- Numbers under 1000: returns as-is ("0", "42", "999")
- Thousands: proper K suffix ("1K", "1.4K", "500K")
- Millions: proper M suffix ("1M", "2.3M")
- Edge cases: NaN, Infinity, negative numbers
- Decimal handling: drops trailing .0, rounds correctly

### formatStarCountFull Tests
- Locale-aware formatting with commas
- Handles all number ranges

### parseStarCount Tests
- Parses K/M suffixes correctly
- Handles comma-formatted input
- Whitespace tolerance

### Round-trip Consistency
- Verifies formatStarCount → parseStarCount returns original value

## tests/unit/tldr-test-utils.test.ts (16 tests)

### Mock Data Factory Tests
- createMockTool generates valid defaults
- Supports partial overrides
- createMockTools with count and category distribution
- createMockToolsWithSynergies creates interconnected tools
- resetMockIdCounter provides consistent IDs

### Logging Utility Tests
- setLogLevel/getLogLevel work correctly
- All log methods callable without throwing
- timing() returns duration value

### Accessibility Utility Tests
- hasAccessibleName detects aria-label, text, title
- meetsTouchTargetSize checks dimensions

### Custom Matcher Tests
- toHaveValidSynergies passes for valid references
- toHaveValidSynergies fails for invalid references
- toBeAccessible works on buttons and links

## tests/unit/content-validation.test.ts (35 tests)

### Schema Validation
- All projects have required fields (name, kind, href, short, description, tags)
- Optional fields have correct types when present

### URL Validation
- All project hrefs are valid URLs
- No duplicate hrefs exist
- GitHub URLs follow correct format
- TLDR tool hrefs are valid GitHub URLs

### Content Quality
- Short descriptions are < 200 chars
- Descriptions are substantive (30-1000 chars)
- No duplicate project names
- TLDR tools have substantive content in all fields

### Tag Consistency
- No overly long tags (max 25 chars)
- Tags are not empty strings
- TLDR techStack items are valid

### TLDR Tools Validation
- All required fields present
- All IDs unique
- All synergies reference existing tools
- Balanced category distribution
- Valid star counts when present

### Other Data Validation
- Hero stats, nav items, endorsements, site config
- Live demos, career timeline, media items
- Threads, writing highlights, flywheel tools

### Cross-Reference Validation
- Project slugs unique
- TLDR shortNames unique
- Endorsement author uniqueness

Run with: bunx vitest run tests/unit/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
